page.text:
Master MV Marina: Ostend Coastguard, Ostend Coastguard, Ostend Coastguard. This is MV Marina, MV Marina, MV Marina. How do you read me? Over.
(…)
Master MV Marina: Ostend Coastguard. This is MV Marina. I have accidental spillage of oil in position 51 degrees 45 minutes North/003 degrees 12 minutes East at 2325 hrs UTC extending twelve metres by three metres to North. Over.
Ostend Coastguard: MV Marina. This is Ostend Coastguard. Say again. Over.
(…)
Ostend Coastguard: MV Marina. This is Ostend Coastguard. What kind of assistance is required? Over.

Master MV Marina: Ostend Coastguard. This is MV Marina. I require oil clearance assistance. Over.
Ostend Coastguard: MV Marina. This is Ostend Coastguard.
(…)
ADVICE. Stay in vicinity of pollution and co-operate (…).
Over.
Master MV Marina: Ostend Coastguard. This is MV Marina. Message understood.
(…)
Out.
